## Description

<!-- Describe what this PR changes and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill (`skills/migration-*/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] New agent (`agents/*.agent.md`)
- [ ] New prompt (`prompts/*.prompt.md`)
- [ ] Updated instructions (`instructions/*.instructions.md`)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if skill/agent was added or removed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if public API (commands, skills table) changed
- [ ] Skill/agent has a clear description and trigger keywords
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or PII in markdown files
